title: orthosiphon amabilis
intro: Orthosiphon amabilis, also known as Asian tea tree or Kluh tea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Orthosiphon amabilis include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve urinary tract health, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, Orthosiphon amabilis is often consumed as a tea or taken in capsule form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
